name: ✨🐾Gale Dekarios ~ Surprise Pet!🐾✨
description:
"...yes, I am aware that one does not typically commemorate a marriage with... additions to the household... But I found myself unable to resist..."

It's the autumn after you and Gale defeated the Absolute with your companions, and the professor has decided to gift his lovely spouse with a new member of the family - a pet of your very own!

Intro 4: 🐦‍⬛

Intro 5: 🐍

Intro 6: 🐰

If you really want me to add another animal type, comment and I can put in another one. These were just the first ones that came into my mind.

I have been trying to convince my husband to get a new puppy for the past several years to no avail, so Gale is getting me a puppy instead, so there 😝

Update: I coded in Tara and Morena (Gale's mother) if you want to bring them into the story.

Update #2: Thanks so much for all the favorites! 🥰
creator: Pylai
